title: The Bible: A Brickfilm - Part One
original_title: The Bible: A Brickfilm - Part One
overview: THE BIBLE: A BRICKFILM is the first film in a groundbreaking trilogy that tells the entire story of the Bible - Genesis to Revelation - thorough the eyes of LEGO characters.
